name: @cossistant/browser
author: Cossistant team
description: Browser runtime and CDN embed for the Cossistant support widget.

scripts.build: bun run build:lib && bun run build:embed && bun run prepare-package
scripts.build:embed: bun run build:embed:js && bun run build:embed:css
scripts.build:embed:js: tsdown --config tsdown.embed.config.ts && mv dist/embed/loader.iife.js dist/embed/loader.js && mv dist/embed/widget.iife.js dist/embed/widget.js
scripts.pub:release: bun run build && npm publish --access public
scripts.pub:beta: bun run build && npm publish --access public --tag beta --no-git-checks
scripts.pub:next: bun run build && npm publish --access public --tag next --no-git-checks
